title: [UNOFFICIAL] [TACZ] Fallout Gunpack
description: [Unofficial] NeoForge Port  of LesRaisins Studio's Fallout-themed gun pack for TaCZ
body: \[Unofficial\] NeoForge Port of LesRaisins Studio's Fallout-themed [\[TACZ\] Fallout Gunpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-fallout-gunpack) for TaCZ. **DO NOT REPORT ANY BUGS WITH THIS PORT TO THE ORIGINAL DEVS!** Report bugs here in this project's issues tab. # ![](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/01/08/fallout.png) Fallout Gunpack is a Fallout 4 themed TaCZ MOD addon MOD, covering many elaborate Fallout weapons with some other author's favorite colorful weapons, if you like the wasteland style weapons welcome to subscribe this MOD. we will add more exquisite Fallout weapons in the subsequent updates. ![](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/01/08/1k1udu.png) # ![](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/01/08/fallout_cf_allgun.png) Dependency ![](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2025/01/08/fallout_dependency.png) - Place the \`.jar\` file in your \`mods\` folder \*\*(not\*\* tacz gunpack path). \- Requires \*\*TaCZ 1.1.6+\*\* for \*\*Minecraft 1.21.1\*\* (NeoForge loader). Credits & Notes **Original Author**: LesRaisins Studio (creator of the original Fallout Gunpack) **Port Author**: Britakee **Publishing Note**: Original TaCZ dev has explicitly approved publishing this NeoForge port: "it's ok to create the project and release it yourself… you can add me as the 'original author' or under any other appropriate role." ![](https://s1.directupload.eu/images/260101/sq85hf22.png)
